summary: Iteration 274 - Hexagram Compass, UtilityDock, EmergencyShutOff, and Dual-Persona Sage System. All backend tests PASSED (16/16). Frontend features verified: HexagramCompass with 6 gold lines (Yang solid, Yin broken), UtilityDock toggle expansion, STOP button VOID activation, layer navigation (Hollow/Core/Matrix), Sage dual-persona greetings working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PolarityContext.js: Well-implemented 6-bit hexagram bitmask (000000-111111 = 64 gates) with proper gravity calculations
PolarityContext.js: Supernova velocity-reactive expansion logic correctly triggers when crossing 0.5 threshold
HexagramCompass.js: SVG hexagram lines render correctly with Yang (solid) and Yin (broken) states
HexagramCompass.js: Rotation direction changes based on layer (CW in Hollow, CCW in Matrix)
UtilityDock.js: Clean integration with HexagramCompass, layer label, and gravity bar indicator
EmergencyShutOff.js: Properly activates VOID state, freezes compass, and saves emergency state to localStorage
SageContext.js: Correctly passes layer_mode, gravity, and hexagram to backend for dual-persona selection
sages.py: Dual-persona system with hollow_prompt and matrix_prompt for each Sage working correctly
sages.py: VOID mode returns silent '...' response as expected

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Hexagram Compass, UtilityDock, STOP button, and Sage features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 274 tested the Hexagram Compass and Dual-Persona Sage system. Key data-testids: emergency-shutoff (STOP button), utility-dock, utility-dock-toggle, hexagram-compass, hexagram-indicator, supernova-overlay. Layer routes: /meditation = Hollow (gravity ~0.15), /dashboard = Core (gravity ~0.5), /oracle = Matrix (gravity ~0.85). Sage chat API accepts layer_mode parameter (hollow/core/matrix/void) for persona selection. VOID mode blocks Sage communication and returns '...'.

hexagram_compass_renders.details: HexagramCompass renders with 6 gold lines (12 SVG rects including glow overlays)

hexagram_yang_yin_lines.details: Yang lines are solid, Yin lines are broken (2 segments with gap)

utility_dock_toggle.details: UtilityDock expands to show compass when toggle clicked

layer_label_display.details: Layer label shows CORE/HOLLOW/MATRIX correctly based on route

gravity_bar_indicator.details: Gravity bar shows current depth percentage

stop_button_visible.details: Emergency STOP button visible in top-left corner (top=8px, left=8px)

stop_button_void_state.details: STOP button activates VOID state, freezes compass, shows VOID indicator

sage_chat_hollow_mode.details: Sage chat with layer_mode='hollow' returns grounded persona response

sage_chat_matrix_mode.details: Sage chat with layer_mode='matrix' returns celestial persona response

sage_chat_void_mode.details: Sage chat with layer_mode='void' returns silent '...' response

sage_greeting_elara.details: Elara the Harmonist appears on /meditation with greeting

sage_greeting_sora.details: Sora the Seer appears on /oracle with greeting

sage_audience_modal.details: Sage Audience modal opens with chat input, Request Quest button
